violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --- Pizza cook washing hands in restroom and not at handwash station at pizza location.

General employee practices. — --Food employee observed drinking/using open beverage container outside of designated area. - Cup found in bakery without lid--Food employee observed eating while preparing food and outside of designated area. - Cook eating pizza on cook line
Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --- Saniti Bucket found at 500ppm QT

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Spray hose @ 2-comp sink has electrical tape covering handle and hanging loose. Repair or replace nozzle to provide a cleanable surface.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. - Paper towel dispenser not working at time of inspection in pizza area.
Lighting. — --Light intensity for walk-in refrigeration or food storage area was insufficient. -Walk-in cooler in kitchen-not sufficient lighting to see all areas of the unit.
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
Installed, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Adequate, shielded, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Clean, maintained, tissue, vented, self-closing door (1 pt deducted)
Clean clothes, hair restraints, fingernail maint., jewelry, eating/drinking (1 pt deducted)
Bare hand contact avoided, single- use gloves, and utensils used (3 pts deducted)
Prevented, separated, segregated (5 pts deducted)
Storage, properly handled (1 pt deducted)
Hot holding and cold holding temperatures maintained, unwrapped food not reserved (5 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
